messages.content: make it better :I’m Tanvi, an award winning writer and filmmaker who's been part of Netflix' most successful Indian series yet - Sacred Games - as an AD and Creative Producer that has won the ITA Award and was nominated for the Emmys. I've told the story of India's biggest cricketer, MS Dhoni to inspire a generation of students. My work spans across legacy advertising agencies like Dentsu and  Lowe Lintas. Currently, as a Creative at Talented I'm building a new age agency culture from the ground up.

I am Tanvi, a multi-talented filmmaker and writer with a passion for crafting compelling stories that inspire and engage audiences. My experience in the industry includes working as an Assistant Director and Creative Producer on the acclaimed Netflix series, Sacred Games, which won the prestigious ITA Award and earned Emmy nominations. 

In addition to my work in the film industry, I have also had the privilege of telling the story of Indian cricket legend MS Dhoni, inspiring a generation of students through an engaging and captivating narrative. With a proven track record of success, I have worked for some of the top advertising agencies, including Dentsu and Lowe Lintas. 

Currently, as a Creative at Talented, I am leading the charge in building a new age agency culture from the ground up. With a focus on innovation, creativity, and collaboration, my team and I are working to elevate the industry and create groundbreaking campaigns that captivate audiences and drive results.

My experience in the industry includes working as an Assistant Director on the acclaimed Netflix series, Sacred Games, which won the prestigious ITA Award and earned Emmy nominations. 

In addition to my work in the film industry, I have also had the privilege of telling the story of Indian cricket legends MS Dhoni & Sachin, inspiring a generation through an engaging and captivating narrative. The ad film has crossed 10 crore views on Youtube as of today. With a proven track record of success, I have worked for some of the top advertising agencies, including Dentsu and Lowe Lintas. Also, podcasting is my side hustle. I have a podcast on Spotify titled 'Mukhtasar' which talks about poetry in general. I am passionate about audio industry too having worked with RJ Mantra in my initial days, the creator of M&M Talkies.

Currently, as a Creative at Talented, I am leading the charge in building a new age agency culture from the ground up. With a focus on innovation, creativity, and collaboration, my team and I are working to elevate the industry and create groundbreaking campaigns that captivate audiences and drive results.

Tell us about your career journey. (200 words)

My journey as a creative professional has been a testing yet rewarding one. Initially, I started as a history major, but my love for storytelling led me to explore the creative industry. From my early days freelancing as a writer and voice-over artist, I went on to work on the production of Netflix India’s renowned series, Sacred Games.

I quickly found myself working among some of the top creative minds in the industry, like Dentsu, Lowe Lintas, and Talented, where I currently serve as a senior member of the creative team.

I worked for Tanishq Diwali campaign ‘Utsaah’, Tanishq ‘Little Big Moments’, Pepsodent Teledentistry HUL film, MTVBeats Cricket Mein Hai Beat, Melorra Store Launch, Harman Kardon Launch in India, Unacademy films ‘Mistakes’ ‘Failures’ ‘Lesson No.7’, Cleartrip New Branding Films starring Anil Kapoor and Mini Mathur, Mom’s Magic film ‘Iss Dil Ke Aage Sabki Haar Hai’, Glow & Lovely film ‘Ready.Set. Glow’ representing the 56 women athletes which competed at the Olympics, TVS Radeon film starring Pankaj Tripathi, Launch of a multi-film campaign for ZebPay establish a differentiated positioning for the brand as ‘Crypto Mein Pro’.

However, I never lost my love for telling stories. A year ago, I started my podcast, Mukhtasar, available on Spotify to share the beauty of Hindi and Urdu poetry. It was selected by Kommune as one of the upcoming podcasts to look for in 2022.

My creative journey has transformed me emotionally, propelling me to become the best version of myself.
make it better.

I began my career as a history major, but my passion for storytelling led me to explore the creative industry. I started freelancing as a writer and voice-over artist, and that eventually led me to work on the highly acclaimed Netflix series, Sacred Games. Working on such a prestigious project gave me the opportunity to learn from some of the creative leaders in the industry, which helped shape my skills.

From there, I moved on to work with top advertising agencies like Dentsu and Lowe Lintas, where I was responsible for creating ad films for brands like Tanishq, Pepsodent, and Harman Kardon, among others. More recently, as a senior member of the creative team at Talented, I have been focused on creating groundbreaking campaigns that drive engagement and results.

One of my biggest passions is storytelling, which led to me starting my own podcast, 'Mukhtasar', last year. Sharing the beauty of Hindi and Urdu poetry has been a fulfilling experience, and I'm proud that it was selected by Kommune as one of the upcoming podcasts to watch in 2022.

Overall, my creative journey has been transformative, both professionally and personally. It has taught me to put my own unique stamp on everything I do and to strive to be the very best version of myself.

elaborate on this : worked for Tanishq Diwali campaign ‘Utsaah’, Tanishq ‘Little Big Moments’, Pepsodent Teledentistry HUL film, MTVBeats Cricket Mein Hai Beat, Melorra Store Launch, Harman Kardon Launch in India, Unacademy films ‘Mistakes’ ‘Failures’ ‘Lesson No.7’, Cleartrip New Branding Films starring Anil Kapoor and Mini Mathur, Mom’s Magic film ‘Iss Dil Ke Aage Sabki Haar Hai’, Glow & Lovely film ‘Ready.Set. Glow’ representing the 56 women athletes which competed at the Olympics, TVS Radeon film starring Pankaj Tripathi, Launch of a multi-film campaign for ZebPay establish a differentiated positioning for the brand as ‘Crypto Mein Pro’.

I had the opportunity to work on several well-known ad campaigns during my career. For example, I was a filmmaker for Tanishq's Diwali campaign 'Utsaah', which aimed to convey the message of spreading hope and positivity during uncertain times. It was a great pleasure to be a part of Tanishq's 'Little Big Moments' campaign as well, which celebrated the little things that make life so special.

I also worked on Pepsodent's innovative Teledentistry HUL film, which illustrated the importance of dental health in a fun and engaging way, and created content for the launch of MTV Beats' Cricket Mein Hai Beat, which paid tribute to the unforgettable moments in Indian cricket history.

During the Melorra Store launch, I helped to craft a brand identity by producing and directing campaigns that conveyed the brand's modern and trendy identity. I also created content for Harman Kardon's India launch, contributing to the establishment of the brand's reputation in the Indian market.

I directed and produced a series of Unacademy films that aimed to inspire and motivate students through the power of learning from failures. Similarly, for Mom's Magic film 'Iss Dil Ke Aage Sabki Haar Hai', my team underscored the message that the love and care of a mother can overcome all problems.

In addition, I created content for Glow & Lovely's film 'Ready.Set. Glow', which starred the inspiring 56 women athletes of the Indian contingent at the Olympics. Furthermore, TVS Radeon's film starring Pankaj Tripathi was a project I was proud to work on, achieving an emotional and motivational impact in viewers.

Finally, I directed and produced various films for ZebPay's differentiated positioning as 'Crypto Mein Pro'. Each campaign showcased how ZebPay could help individuals invest in cryptocurrencies and showcased ZebPay’s potential industry-leading features.

tell people about my role as a senior copywriter on these campaign have been, how I worked on concepualizing and writing scripts for all these, how much impressions/views/appreciations/awards it garnered :elaborate on this : worked for Tanishq Diwali campaign ‘Utsaah’, Tanishq ‘Little Big Moments’, Pepsodent Teledentistry HUL film, MTVBeats Cricket Mein Hai Beat, Melorra Store Launch, Harman Kardon Launch in India, Unacademy films ‘Mistakes’ ‘Failures’ ‘Lesson No.7’, Cleartrip New Branding Films starring Anil Kapoor and Mini Mathur, Mom’s Magic film ‘Iss Dil Ke Aage Sabki Haar Hai’, Glow & Lovely film ‘Ready.Set. Glow’ representing the 56 women athletes which competed at the Olympics, TVS Radeon film starring Pankaj Tripathi, Launch of a multi-film campaign for ZebPay establish a differentiated positioning for the brand as ‘Crypto Mein Pro’.

As a senior copywriter on these campaigns, my role included conceptualizing and writing scripts for all the ads mentioned. For example, for Tanishq's Diwali campaign 'Utsaah', I worked on developing a script that conveyed a message of hope and positivity during challenging times. Similarly, for Pepsodent's Teledentistry HUL film, my team and I came up with a fun and engaging storyline to effectively communicate the importance of dental health.

With MTVBeats' Cricket Men Hai Beat campaign, I worked on creating content that celebrated the iconic moments in Indian cricket history. For Cleartrip's new branding films, I collaborated with the creative team to come up with a unique and impactful storyline that captured the brand's messaging.

For other projects, like Glow & Lovely's 'Ready.Set.Glow' campaign featuring 56 women athletes, and Mom’s Magic film 'Iss Dil Ke Aage Sabki Haar Hai', I developed emotionally resonant scripts that touched the hearts of viewers. I also played an essential role in crafting the brand identity for Melorra's store launch and helped establish Harman Kardon as a reputable brand in the Indian market.

These campaigns garnered an impressive number of views and appreciation on digital platforms, and some even won awards. For Tanishq's 'Utsaah' campaign, we received critical acclaim, and for MTVBeats' Cricket Mein Hai Beat, we won an Abby award. As a senior copywriter, I take pride in being part of such successful campaigns that have impacted the audience and contributed to the brand's success.
write better : I have handles digital mandate for brands like JBL, Melorra, Toyota, Bangalore International Airport, Harman Kardon, MTVBeats, Colors Channel, Lenskart.

I have had the pleasure of handling a wide range of digital mandates for highly recognized brands including JBL, Melorra, Toyota, Bangalore International Airport, Harman Kardon, MTVBeats, Colors Channel, and Lenskart. My experience and expertise in digital marketing have enabled me to create and execute successful campaigns that engage, educate, and entertain target audiences. With a deep understanding of consumer behavior and trends, I developed strategies that drove organic growth, improved customer engagement, and allowed brands to stand out in today's competitive landscape. From devising creative concepts to monitoring digital campaigns, I have played a critical role in enhancing brand recall and visibility for these leading companies. It is gratifying to see the results of my hard work with increased impressions, click-through rates, and conversions, which have boosted the bottom line for each of these brands.
explain your role as a copywriter on these brands : be consise and crisp.

As a copywriter, my primary role was to create persuasive and engaging content for various marketing collaterals. For JBL, I wrote scripts for video ads and social media campaigns to amplify the brand's persona among premium audio enthusiasts. With Melorra, I developed compelling taglines and ad copies that emphasized the brand's promise of modern and trendy jewelry. At Toyota, I wrote impactful content for website banners, ads, and social media campaigns that successfully communicated the brand's value proposition. For Bangalore International Airport, Harman Kardon, MTVBeats, Colors Channel, and Lenskart, I wrote website copy, ad scripts, and ad copies that captured the audience's attention and conveyed the brand's messaging effectively.
